diffs.diff:
--- a/diag_models_v2.py
+++ b/diag_models_v2.py
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+import sys

+print("Testing torchmdnet.models exports...")

+try:

+    import torchmdnet.models as tmodels

+    print("torchmdnet.models contents:", [x for x in dir(tmodels) if not x.startswith('_')])

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f"torchmdnet import failed: {e}")

+

+print("\nTesting e3nn import and basic network...")

+try:

+    import e3nn

+    print("e3nn imported", e3nn.__version__)

+    import torch

+    from e3nn.o3 import Irreps, spherical_harmonics

+    from e3nn.nn import Gate

+    print("e3nn submodules OK")

+    # Try simple equivariant linear

+    from e3nn.o3 import Linear

+    lin = Linear(Irreps("1o"), Irreps("0e"))

+    x = torch.randn(10, 3)  # 1o: 3 components

+    y = lin(x)

+    print("e3nn Linear forward OK, output shape:", y.shape)

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f"e3nn test failed: {e}")

+    import traceback

+    traceback.print_exc()

+print("\nDiagnostic complete.")
